taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Extracellular Matrix and Collagen (BI6.1-3).

words.clue: Most abundant protein in the human body with a triple helix structure
Vitamin required for hydroxylation of proline in collagen synthesis
Disease caused by vitamin C deficiency with bleeding gums and poor wound healing
ECM protein that provides elastic recoil to arteries, lungs, and skin
GAG abundantly found in synovial fluid and vitreous humour
Glycoprotein that links cells to the extracellular matrix via integrins
Brittle bone disease caused by Type I collagen mutations
Specialised thin ECM layer underlying all epithelial cells
